channel.title: Science Friday Videos
channel.description: Covering everything about science and technology -- from the outer reaches of space to the tiniest microbes in our bodies -- Science Friday is your source for entertaining and educational stories and activities. Each week, host Ira Flatow interviews scientists and inventors like Sylvia Earle, Elon Musk, Neil deGrasse Tyson, and more.
channel.itunes:subtitle: It's brain fun, for curious people
channel.itunes:author: Science Friday
channel.itunes:summary: Covering everything about science and technology -- from the outer reaches of space to the tiniest microbes in our bodies -- Science Friday is your source for entertaining and educational stories and activities. Each week, host Ira Flatow interviews scientists and inventors like Sylvia Earle, Elon Musk, Neil deGrasse Tyson, and more.

item.title: Wondrous Beauty Made From Dead Insects
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Artist Jennifer Angus creates a celebration of cicadas and insects in her eye-catching collages and dioramas.
item.itunes:subtitle: Artist Jennifer Angus creates a celebration of cicadas and insects in her eye-catching collages and dioramas.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: A Tour Through Maria Ferreira’s Crystal Gardens
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Blending chemistry, physics, and animation, artist Maria Constanza Ferreira grows tiny gardens of crystals to create dazzling images.
item.itunes:subtitle: Blending chemistry, physics, and animation, artist Maria Constanza Ferreira grows tiny gardens of crystals to create dazzling images.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: How Climate Change Is Giving Maine’s Wild Blueberries The Blues
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Climate change is threatening Maine's native blueberries. These researchers are looking to provide solutions—and help farmers in the process.
item.itunes:subtitle: Climate change is threatening Maines native blueberries. These researchers are looking to provide solutions—and help farmers in the process.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: How Puffins On The Gulf Of Maine Act As ‘Sentinels Of Climate Change’
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Learn how conservationists live on an isolated island to study Maine's puffin population, and how the birds are dealing with warming seas.
item.itunes:subtitle: Learn how conservationists live on an isolated island to study Maines puffin population, and how the birds are dealing with warming seas.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: These Stunning Images Were Created Using The Forces Behind Evolution
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: A computer programmer and artist discovers inspiration in biological growth processes.
item.itunes:subtitle: A computer programmer and artist discovers inspiration in biological growth processes.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: Surveying The Northern Lights
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: For nearly two decades, Don Hampton has been monitoring the Northern Lights in Alaska to understand the energy pouring down from auroras.
item.itunes:subtitle: For nearly two decades, Don Hampton has been monitoring the Northern Lights in Alaska to understand the energy pouring down from auroras.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: Breakthrough: The Slime Minder
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Discover how Audrey Dussutour is breaking new ground in our understanding of animal cognition from an unexpected source: slime molds.
item.itunes:subtitle: Discover how Audrey Dussutour is breaking new ground in our understanding of animal cognition from an unexpected source: slime molds.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: Breakthrough: The Lake Sentinel
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Discover how earth scientist Africa Flores-Anderson uses satellite data to help underserved communities.
item.itunes:subtitle: Discover how earth scientist Africa Flores-Anderson uses satellite data to help underserved communities.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: Breakthrough: The Galaxy Hunter
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Learn about how astrophysicist Burçin Mutlu-Pakdil has defied odds—breaking cultural conventions and discovering a completely new kind of galaxy.
item.itunes:subtitle: Learn about how astrophysicist Burçin Mutlu-Pakdil has defied odds—breaking cultural conventions and discovering a completely new kind of galaxy.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin

item.title: Breakthrough: The Trauma Tracer
item.dc:creator: Luke Groskin
item.description: Follow Bianca Jones Marlin as she uses cutting-edge neuroscience to uncover how the effects of trauma can be passed down from generation to generation.
item.itunes:subtitle: Follow Bianca Jones Marlin as she uses cutting-edge neuroscience to uncover how the effects of trauma can be passed down from generation to generation.
item.itunes:author: Luke Groskin
